sample_purposes: I have been invited to present work via an oral presentation while attending the Korean Acadamy of Tuberculosis and Resiratory Disease International Conference on October 30th, which is an upgrade from my planned poster presentation as in document ARL-250811-10.

When attending the Korean Acadamy of Tuberculosis and Resiratory Disease International Conference in October, I plan to present our work on developing fluorescent reporter non-tuberculosis strains that can be used in drug discovery pipelines as well as for disease modeling.
